title: 10 best herbal creams for cystitis

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Bearberry creams helps with cystitis because they contain a natural compound called uva ursi, which has potent antibacterial properties. Uva ursi has been traditionally used to treat urinary tract infections (UTIs) and is particularly effective in soothing the symptoms of cystitis. The cream works by reducing inflammation and killing bacteria that may be causing the infection, providing relief from burning sensations during urination, frequent urination, and painful bladder spasms. By addressing the root cause of the issue, bearberry creams can help to alleviate discomfort and promote faster recovery.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial property: Bearberry cream contains arbutin, which converts to hydroquinone in the body, exhibiting antimicrobial activity against bacteria such as Escherichia coli (E. coli) and Staphylococcus aureus, helping to combat urinary tract infections that can cause cystitis.

Anti-inflammatory property: The astringent properties of bearberry help reduce swelling and inflammation in the urinary tract, alleviating discomfort, pain, and burning sensations associated with cystitis.

Antioxidant property: Bearberry's antioxidant compounds neutralize free radicals, which can contribute to oxidative stress and tissue damage in the urinary system, potentially reducing the severity of cystitis symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing pain and discomfort associated with cystitis.
Barks: The barks contain tannins, which help to reduce inflammation and soothe urinary tract issues.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 grams of dried arctostaphylos uva ursi leaves and stems.
Grind the dried herb into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 30 seconds.
Combine the powdered herb with 100 grams of sweet almond oil in a heatproof glass jar.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler at 160°f for 1 hour and 15 minutes to infuse.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth into another glass jar, discarding the solids.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow creams helps with cystitis because it provides natural relief from bladder irritation and inflammation. The herb marshmallow root, commonly used in cream form, has anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and protect the urinary tract, reducing discomfort and pain associated with cystitis. Additionally, marshmallow cream's soothing and moisturizing qualities help to calm irritated skin around the vulva and perineum, further alleviating symptoms of this common bladder condition.
remedy_properties: Mucilage: The thick, protective coating created by the mucilage helps to soothe and calm irritated bladder walls, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with cystitis.
Antioxidants: The antioxidants present in marshmallow herbs help to neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and damage to bladder tissue, contributing to symptoms of cystitis.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: Marshmallow contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and saponins that reduce inflammation and pain associated with cystitis, providing relief from burning sensations and frequent urination.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilage, a thick, protective substance that helps soothe and shield the bladder lining from irritation.
Rhyzomes: Contain anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce swelling and alleviate pain associated with cystitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20g of dried marshmallow root (althaea officinalis) from reputable sources for use in the cream recipe.
Combine 20g of dried marshmallow root with 100ml of boiling water in a heatproof container for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the infused liquid through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another container discarding the solids and retaining the infused liquid.
Mix 50g of coconut oil, 20g of beeswax, and 20ml of the marshmallow root infusion in a double boiler until fully incorporated and melted.
Remove from heat and let cool to around 60°c before whipping with an electric mixer for 2-3 minutes to create a smooth cream consistency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenrod creams helps with cystitis because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The cream's active ingredients, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, work together to reduce inflammation and alleviate discomfort in the bladder and urinary tract. By soothing irritated tissues and eliminating bacteria, goldenrod creams provide rapid relief from the symptoms of cystitis, including pain, burning sensations, and frequent urination. This natural remedy offers a gentle yet effective way to manage the discomfort associated with this common condition.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Goldenrod contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and triterpenes, which help reduce swelling and ease pain associated with cystitis.
Antimicrobial activity: Goldenrod's antimicrobial properties can help combat bacterial infections that may contribute to cystitis, reducing the risk of complications and promoting healing.

Uric acid reduction: Goldenrod has been shown to reduce uric acid levels in the body, which can help alleviate symptoms like burning pain during urination and frequent urination associated with cystitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in soothing and calming irritated bladder tissue.
Rhyzomes: Contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, helping to reduce urinary tract infections.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20g of dried solidago virgaurea leaves and stems from trusted sources.
Combine the dried herb with 10ml of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil in a clean glass jar.
Infuse the mixture by placing it in a warm water bath for 4 hours to release the active compounds.
Strain the infused liquid through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another clean glass container.
Mix 20g of beeswax with 10ml of the infused liquid and heat until melted and smooth.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle creams helps with cystitis because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm irritated bladder tissues. The cream's active ingredients, including flavonoids and carotenoids, work to reduce swelling and alleviate discomfort associated with the condition. Additionally, stinging nettle has been shown to have a beneficial effect on the urinary tract, helping to reduce inflammation and ease symptoms such as burning and frequency. This natural approach can provide effective relief from the discomfort of cystitis without harsh chemicals or medications.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory effects: Stinging nettle's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as beta-sitosterol and saponins, help reduce inflammation and swelling in the urinary tract, providing relief from cystitis symptoms.

Antioxidant properties: Nettle's antioxidants, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, neutralize free radicals that can damage bladder tissues and contribute to cystitis development, reducing oxidative stress and promoting healing.

Urinary antiseptic and antimicrobial effects: Nettle's compounds, such as quercetin and caffeic acid, have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria and viruses that can cause urinary tract infections (UTIs), including cystitis, while also helping to prevent bacterial adhesion and biofilm formation.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making them effective in soothing the urinary tract and reducing bacterial growth associated with cystitis.
Rhizomes: Rhizomes contain a high concentration of antioxidants and flavonoids, which help to reduce inflammation and combat oxidative stress that can exacerbate cystitis symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh stinging nettle leaves measuring approximately 20 grams.
Dry the harvested leaves in a cool dark place for at least 24 hours.
Combine dried nettle leaves with sweet almond oil and beeswax in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 30 minutes stirring occasionally until melted and combined.
Strain the cream through cheesecloth into a clean container and allow to cool before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Corn creams helps with cystitis because they provide a soothing and gentle relief to the irritated bladder and urinary tract. The anti-inflammatory properties of herbs such as chamomile, calendula, and uva ursi in corn creams help to reduce swelling and ease pain associated with cystitis. Additionally, these creams can also help to flush out bacteria and other toxins from the urinary tract, promoting a healthy healing environment. As a result, herbal corn creams can offer effective natural relief from the discomfort and symptoms of cystitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal creams containing ingredients like calendula, chamomile, or St. John's Wort can help reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with cystitis by decreasing swelling and pain.

Antimicrobial properties: Herbs like goldenseal, uva ursi, and marshmallow root possess antimicrobial compounds that can help combat bacterial infections in the urinary tract, reducing symptoms of cystitis such as burning during urination.

Soothing and protective properties: Ingredients like aloe vera, chamomile, or witch hazel can provide a protective barrier on the skin, helping to soothe and calm irritated areas, reduce itching, and promote healing.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help soothe and calm the urinary tract.
Rhyzomes: Contain bioactive compounds that have antibacterial properties, effective against bacteria that cause cystitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20g of dried zea mays flowers and leaves from a trusted source for optimal potency.
Combine the dried herbs with 50ml of organic coconut oil in a clean glass jar for infusion.
Store the mixture in a cool dark place for 2 weeks to allow for thorough extraction and settling.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth into another container, retaining the infused oil and discarding solids after 24 hours.
Add 10g of beeswax pellets to the infused oil and heat gently over low heat until fully incorporated and smooth.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion creams helps with cystitis because they harness the natural anti-inflammatory properties of the plant. The cream's active ingredients, such as taraxasterol and taraxacosides, have been shown to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, providing relief from the burning sensation and frequent urination associated with cystitis. Additionally, dandelion's diuretic properties help to increase urine production, flushing out bacteria and toxins that can exacerbate the condition. This natural approach offers a gentle and effective way to manage symptoms of cystitis without harsh medications.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Dandelion creams contain anti-inflammatory compounds like taraxasterol, which help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of cystitis such as pain, burning, and frequency.

Antibacterial properties: The antioxidants and phenolic acids present in dandelion creams have antibacterial properties that help combat bacterial infections that can contribute to cystitis, reducing the risk of complications and promoting healing.

Uroprotective effects: Dandelion's uroprotective properties help soothe and protect the urinary tract mucosa, reducing irritation and discomfort associated with cystitis, while also preventing further inflammation and damage.
remedy_parts: Roots: Dandelion roots have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing pain and inflammation associated with cystitis.
Buds: The buds contain flavonoids, which help to reduce oxidative stress and alleviate symptoms of cystitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest taraxacum officinale roots and leaves of dried plant material for extraction.
Infuse the mixture in a double boiler for 30 minutes at low heat temperature.
Filter the infusion through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean container.
Mix the herbal extract with a carrier oil and emulsifier in a small bowl.
Whip the mixture into a creamy consistency using an electric mixer or whisk.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice creams helps with cystitis because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory properties. This natural ingredient helps to reduce swelling and discomfort in the urinary tract, providing relief from the burning sensation associated with cystitis. Additionally, licorice cream's soothing effects can calm irritated bladder tissues, promoting a speedy recovery. By targeting the root cause of the issue, herbal licorice creams offer a gentle yet effective solution for managing cystitis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Licorice root contains anti-inflammatory compounds like glycyrrhizin, which can help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms such as burning and frequency associated with cystitis.
Antimicrobial properties: The antimicrobial activity of licorice root helps combat bacterial infections that may contribute to cystitis, reducing the risk of complications and promoting healing.

Soother and protective properties: Licorice cream's soothing and protective effects on the urinary tract mucous membranes can help alleviate discomfort, reduce irritation, and promote the growth of healthy tissue.
remedy_parts: Roots: Licorice roots contain anti-inflammatory compounds like glycyrrhizin, which helps soothe and reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, alleviating symptoms of cystitis.
Barks: The barks of the licorice plant have been traditionally used to treat bladder infections, including cystitis, due to their antibacterial and antifungal properties.
remedy_recipe: Extract 10g of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots in 100ml of boiling water for 30 minutes.
Filter the liquid through a cheesecloth and combine it with 20g of beeswax and 20g of coconut oil.
Heat the mixture to 60°c and stir until the wax is fully incorporated and the solution cools slightly.
Add 10ml of aloe vera gel and 5ml of vitamin e oil to the cooled solution and blend well.
Pour the final mixture into sterilized containers and allow it to set at room temperature for 24 hours.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold creams helps with cystitis because they contain anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe and calm the bladder lining, reducing irritation and discomfort. The cream's natural antioxidants also help to neutralize free radicals that can exacerbate symptoms of cystitis. Additionally, the cream's antimicrobial properties may help to combat bacterial infections that often contribute to the development of cystitis. By providing rapid relief from pain and discomfort, pot marigold creams offer a natural and effective way to manage cystitis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Pot marigold's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce inflammation and swelling in the urinary tract, which can alleviate pain and discomfort associated with cystitis.

Antibacterial and antifungal properties: The herb's antimicrobial agents have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi that can cause UTIs, helping to clear up infections and prevent recurring episodes of cystitis.

Soothing and mucilaginous properties: Pot marigold's gel-like texture and soothing compounds can help calm and protect the bladder lining, reducing irritation and discomfort caused by urinary tract inflammation and infection.
remedy_parts: Roots: Potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties in roots help soothe and calm irritated bladder tissues.
Flowers: Rich in carotenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have antimicrobial and antispasmodic effects, reducing inflammation and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh calendula flowers in the morning after dew has dried for maximum potency.
Dry the harvested flowers by spreading them out in a single layer on paper towels for 7 days.
Combine 20 grams of dried calendula flowers with 100 milliliters of carrier oil such as sweet almond or coconut oil.
Steep the mixture in a double boiler at 150 degrees fahrenheit for 2 hours to extract beneficial compounds.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth and discard solids before whipping with beeswax to create a soothing cream that can be applied topically 3 times daily.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yarrow creams helps with cystitis because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which soothe and calm irritated bladder tissue. The herb's flavonoids and volatile oils have been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate burning sensations associated with cystitis. Additionally, yarrow's antiseptic qualities help prevent bacterial overgrowth and promote a healthy balance of microflora in the urinary tract, further supporting healing and relief from symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Yarrow's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce swelling and discomfort in the urinary tract, providing relief from symptoms such as burning during urination.
Antimicrobial: Yarrow's antimicrobial properties help combat bacterial infections, which can contribute to cystitis, by inhibiting the growth of bacteria such as E. coli.
Tonic and astringent: Yarrow's tonic and astringent properties help strengthen and tighten the bladder lining, reducing the risk of further irritation and infection, and promoting healing and repair.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the yarrow plant contain compounds that help reduce inflammation and soothe the urinary tract, making them effective in treating symptoms of cystitis.
Barks: The barks of the yarrow plant have antiseptic properties, which can help prevent bacterial infections from exacerbating cystitis symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried achillea millefolium leaves and flowers in the summer months when they are in full bloom.
Combine 2 tablespoons of dried achillea millefolium with 1 cup of sweet almond oil and 1/4 cup of beeswax in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, to infuse the achillea millefolium into the oil and melt the beeswax.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean glass container, discarding the solids and reserving the infused oil.
Allow the infused oil to cool and thicken for at least 2 hours before transferring it to sterilized cream jars and storing them in the refrigerator for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Red clover creams helps with cystitis because of its ability to reduce inflammation and ease symptoms such as burning during urination. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties help to soothe the urinary tract, providing relief from discomfort and pain. Additionally, red clover has been shown to have antibacterial properties that may help combat the underlying infection causing cystitis. As a result, using herbal red clover creams can provide effective natural relief for women experiencing symptoms of cystitis.
remedy_properties: Isoflavones: Red clover cream contains isoflavones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, helping to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the urinary tract and alleviate symptoms of cystitis.

Saponins: The saponins present in red clover cream have been found to have antibacterial properties, which can help combat bacterial infections that may contribute to cystitis, such as E. coli and other pathogens.

Phytoestrogens: Red clover cream's phytoestrogenic compounds, including isoflavones and lignans, have estrogenic effects on the body, which may help soothe and stabilize the urinary tract lining, reducing symptoms of cystitis such as burning and frequency.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids, which help to soothe and calm bladder irritations.
Flowers: Abundant in isoflavones, which have anti-inflammatory properties that ease cystitis symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh red clover flowers measuring 20 grams for each 100 milliliters of carrier oil.
Combine the harvested flowers with 100 milliliters of carrier oil such as sweet almond or olive oil in a clean glass jar.
Store the mixture in a cool dark place for four to six weeks allowing for infusion and extraction of active compounds.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another clean container discarding the solids.
Mix one part of the infused oil with one part of a base cream such as beeswax and coconut oil warming gently until smooth and consistent.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Purslane creams helps with cystitis because they contain potent anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe the bladder lining, reducing inflammation and discomfort. The herb's astringent properties also help to constrict blood vessels, decreasing swelling and relieving pain associated with cystitis. Additionally, purslane's natural antiseptic and antibacterial properties may help combat bacterial infections that can contribute to cystitis, promoting healing and preventing future occurrences of the condition. This holistic approach can provide long-term relief from recurring cystitis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Purslane cream's anti-inflammatory property helps reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with cystitis, providing relief from burning sensations and painful urination.

Antimicrobial property: The antimicrobial properties of purslane cream help combat bacterial infections, such as E. coli, that often cause cystitis, promoting a healthy urinary tract environment and preventing further infection.

Antioxidant property: Purslane's antioxidant properties help protect the bladder lining from oxidative stress and damage caused by chronic inflammation, reducing the risk of recurrent cystitis episodes.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of purslane have been traditionally used to treat urinary tract infections, including cystitis, due to their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties.
Rhizomes: The rhizomes of purslane contain compounds with analgesic and antispasmodic effects, making them effective in soothing bladder discomfort and reducing pain associated with cystitis.
remedy_recipe: Gather required ingredients including dried portulaca oleracea leaves and stems, coconut oil, beeswax, and vitamin e oil.
Mix 20 grams of dried portulaca oleracea with 100 milliliters of boiling water and let it steep for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass bowl and discard solids.
Combine the infused liquid with 50 grams of coconut oil, 20 grams of beeswax, and 5 milliliters of vitamin e oil in a small saucepan over low heat.
Stir the mixture constantly for 30 minutes or until the beeswax is fully melted and the cream has a smooth consistency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile creams helps with cystitis because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. When applied topically to the affected area, chamomile's soothing compounds help reduce inflammation, ease burning sensations, and combat bacterial infections that can cause urinary tract symptoms. The cream also has a calming effect on the bladder and urethra, promoting relaxation and reducing spasms that can exacerbate cystitis symptoms. This natural remedy provides relief from discomfort and pain, allowing individuals to manage their condition with greater ease.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Chamomile cream helps reduce inflammation and swelling in the urinary tract, which can alleviate discomfort and pain associated with cystitis.

Antibacterial properties: Chamomile's antibacterial compounds, such as apigenin and luteolin, can help combat bacterial infections that often cause cystitis, reducing symptoms like burning and frequency.

Soothing and calming effects: The flavonoids and terpenoids in chamomile cream have a calming effect on the urinary tract muscles, which can help reduce spasms and discomfort associated with cystitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help soothe and calm irritated bladder tissue.
Flowers: Contain apigenin and other anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce pain and inflammation associated with cystitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh matricaria chamomilla flowers and dry them completely in a warm, well-ventilated area for at least two weeks.
Grind the dried matricaria chamomilla flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Combine one part of the powdered matricaria chamomilla with three parts of coconut oil in a small saucepan over low heat for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter to separate the infused oil from the solids, discarding the solids.
Mix the infused oil with beeswax and vitamin e oil in a ratio of 70:15:15, melting the mixture slowly over low heat before pouring it into sterilized jars for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian creams helps with cystitis because they contain a natural ingredient that soothes and calms irritated bladder tissue, reducing inflammation and discomfort. The anti-inflammatory properties of valerian root help to ease the burning sensation and stinging associated with urinary tract infections. Additionally, valerian creams can help to relax the muscles in the pelvic region, allowing for smoother urine flow and relief from frequent urination. By providing fast-acting relief, herbal valerian creams offer a natural solution for managing cystitis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Valerian cream helps reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, which can alleviate symptoms such as burning and discomfort associated with cystitis.
Antioxidant properties: Valerian's antioxidant effects help protect the bladder and urinary tract from damage caused by oxidative stress, reducing the risk of chronic cystitis and its complications.
Soothing and calming effects: Valerian's calming properties can help relax the bladder muscles and reduce spasms, providing relief from frequent urination, urgency, and pain associated with cystitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Valerian roots are used due to their rich content of sesquiterpenes, which help to soothe and calm irritated bladder tissues.

Rhizomes: The rhizomes of valerian contain a high concentration of valerenic acid, an active compound that has anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing pain and discomfort associated with cystitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried valeriana officinalis root and soak it in carrier oil for 2 weeks.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth into a clean glass bottle discarding solids after 24 hours.
Mix equal parts of the infused oil with beeswax and shea butter in a double boiler over low heat stirring constantly.
Allow the mixture to cool and thicken before whipping it with an electric mixer until smooth consistency is achieved within 30 minutes.
Pour the cream into sterilized tubes or jars and store them in the refrigerator for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree creams helps with cystitis because they contain potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds derived from the leaves of the Ginkgo biloba plant. These extracts have been traditionally used to soothe urinary tract discomfort and reduce inflammation, which are common symptoms associated with cystitis. The creams may help to relax the muscles in the bladder and urethra, reducing spasms and pain, while also inhibiting bacterial growth that can contribute to the condition.
remedy_properties: Astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds: Maidenhair tree creams contain astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds, such as flavonoids and polyphenols, which help to reduce inflammation and shrink swelling in the urinary tract, alleviating symptoms of cystitis.

Antimicrobial properties: The cream's antimicrobial properties, derived from its content of terpenes and phenolic acids, help to inhibit the growth of bacteria that can contribute to cystitis, reducing the risk of infection and promoting healing.

Uroprotective effects: Maidenhair tree creams may also possess uroprotective properties, which help to protect the urinary tract from damage caused by inflammation or bacterial infections, thereby reducing the severity and duration of cystitis symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the maidenhair tree contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce pain and discomfort associated with cystitis.
Barks: The barks of the maidenhair tree contain antimicrobial properties that combat bacterial infections, which can cause cystitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of fresh ginkgo biloba leaves from a trusted source or store-bought dried form.
Blend the ginkgo biloba leaves with 200ml of cold-pressed coconut oil in a food processor for 3 minutes.
Combine the blended mixture with 50g of beeswax and heat it to 60°c using a double boiler method over low heat for 15 minutes.
Mix 10g of vitamin e oil, 5g of aloe vera gel, and 2ml of witch hazel extract into the warm cream base and stir well for 5 minutes.
Pour the cream mixture into sterilized glass jars, label, and store in the refrigerator at 5°c for up to 6 months or freeze for up to a year.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Roselle creams helps with cystitis because they possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and calm the bladder lining. The cream's active compounds, such as anthocyanins and flavonoids, work together to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and prevent bacterial growth. Additionally, roselle's astringent properties help to tighten the bladder muscles, reducing urgency and frequency of urination. By providing relief from discomfort and inflammation, roselle creams can offer natural and effective management of cystitis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal roselle creams contain flavonoids, which help reduce inflammation in the urinary tract and alleviate pain associated with cystitis.
Antimicrobial properties: Roselle contains compounds like quercetin and kaempferol, which have antibacterial and antifungal activity, helping to combat bacterial infections that can cause cystitis.

Uroprotective properties: The flavonoids present in roselle creams help protect the urinary tract lining from damage caused by inflammation and infection, promoting healing and reducing the risk of recurrent cystitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in reducing inflammation and soothing bladder irritation.
Rhyzomes: Contain bioactive compounds that help to reduce pain and discomfort associated with cystitis, while also providing antimicrobial properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of fresh hibiscus sabdariffa flowers and rinse them thoroughly with cold water.
Combine the rinsed flowers with 1 liter of boiling distilled water in a large saucepan and steep for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl, discarding the solids.
Mix 100g of beeswax and 50g of coconut oil into the strained liquid until well combined and melted.
Pour the mixture into sterilized jars and seal immediately, allowing it to cool and solidify at room temperature within 30 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric creams helps with cystitis because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe the burning sensation and discomfort caused by the urinary tract infection. The active compound curcumin in turmeric reduces swelling and inflammation in the bladder lining, alleviating painful urination and frequency. Additionally, turmeric's antimicrobial properties combat bacterial infections, promoting a healthy balance of good bacteria in the urinary tract and reducing symptoms of cystitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Turmeric's curcuminoids, such as curcumin and bisdemethoxycurcumin, have potent anti-inflammatory effects that can reduce swelling and discomfort associated with cystitis.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in turmeric creams, including vitamin E and beta-carotene, help protect the urinary tract from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can exacerbate cystitis symptoms.

Anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties of curcumin: Curcumin has been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria that cause cystitis, such as Escherichia coli (E. coli), while also reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with the infection.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Turmeric's rhyzomes have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce pain and swelling associated with cystitis.
Roots: The roots of turmeric contain curcuminoids, which exhibit potent antimicrobial activity, making them effective against urinary tract infections.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh turmeric roots and dry them in the shade for at least two weeks.
Grind one part dried turmeric powder with three parts coconut oil in a mortar and pestle.
Infuse the mixture in a double boiler for 20 minutes over low heat, stirring occasionally.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth into a glass container, discarding solids and reserving liquid.
Allow the cream to cool and thicken at room temperature for two hours before transferring to an airtight jar.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Burdock creams helps with cystitis because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which soothe the urinary tract and reduce swelling. The cream's ability to penetrate deep into the skin also allows it to target the underlying causes of cystitis, such as bacterial infections and irritants. Additionally, burdock contains phytochemicals that have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria, further contributing to its therapeutic effects in treating this common and often painful condition.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Burdock cream helps reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, which alleviates discomfort and pain associated with cystitis.
Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants in burdock cream protect the urinary tract from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to chronic cystitis and improve overall healing.

Antimicrobial properties: Burdock's antimicrobial compounds help combat bacterial infections that may be contributing to cystitis, reducing the risk of recurrence and promoting a healthy bladder environment.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with cystitis.
Buds: Burdock buds are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which can help soothe and calm irritated bladder tissue.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh burdock root arctium lappa roots and dry them in shade for two weeks.
Combine one part dried burdock root powder with three parts coconut oil in a small bowl.
Heat the mixture over low heat stirring constantly for 30 minutes or until it reaches 160°f.
Remove from heat and let it cool to room temperature then strain through cheesecloth into a clean container.
Add beeswax and vitamin e oil then whip until smooth and creamy using an electric mixer.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dong quai creams helps with cystitis because they contain a unique blend of herbs that work in harmony to alleviate symptoms. The creams' anti-inflammatory properties help reduce swelling and discomfort in the bladder and urinary tract, providing quick relief from pain and burning sensations during urination. Additionally, dong quai's antispasmodic effects calm muscle contractions, reducing the frequency and urgency of trips to the bathroom. This natural combination provides a soothing and comforting solution for individuals suffering from cystitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Dong Quai's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce swelling and ease discomfort associated with cystitis, providing relief from pain and urinary frequency.

Antimicrobial: The antimicrobial properties of Dong Quai may help combat bacterial infections that can contribute to cystitis, reducing the severity of symptoms such as burning sensation while urinating.

Tonic and warming properties: Dong Quai's warming and tonifying effects can help stimulate blood circulation, promote relaxation, and soothe the urinary tract, which may reduce frequency and urgency of urination associated with cystitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins and other bioactive compounds, the roots help soothe inflammation and relieve urinary discomfort associated with cystitis.
Barks: The barks contain flavonoids and polyphenols that possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making them effective in treating urinary tract infections.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh angelica sinensis roots and dry them in a warm oven at 150°f for 2 hours.
Grind 20g of dried angelica sinensis roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered root with 100ml of distilled water to create an infusion that steeps for 10 minutes.
Combine 50g of beeswax, 20g of coconut oil, and 30ml of the prepared angelica sinensis infusion in a heat-proof bowl.
Heat the mixture over low heat while stirring until the ingredients melt and emulsify after 15-20 minutes.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for cystitis are topical creams infused with natural ingredients, such as herbs and botanicals, designed to provide relief from the discomforting symptoms of cystitis. These creams help by soothing the irritated bladder lining, reducing inflammation, and providing antimicrobial properties to combat bacterial infections. Examples include creams containing marshmallow root, uva ursi, and stinging nettle, which have been shown to alleviate burning sensations, frequency, and urgency associated with cystitis. By using these creams, individuals can experience reduced pain and discomfort, improved sleep quality, and enhanced overall well-being.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat cystitis with herbal creams is to apply topically a cream containing marshmallow root, which has anti-inflammatory properties that soothe the bladder lining and reduce discomfort. Another option is a cream infused with stinging nettle, which helps to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms such as burning during urination. Apply these creams to the affected area 2-3 times a day for optimal relief.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to cystitis that are treated with herbal creams are urethritis, vaginitis, and prostatitis. These conditions involve inflammation or infection of the urinary tract and reproductive organs, leading to symptoms such as pain, burning, and discomfort during urination. Herbal creams containing ingredients like aloe vera, chamomile, and tea tree oil have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help soothe and heal these ailments, providing relief from discomfort and reducing the risk of complications.
